rule_metadata.name: Xtreme
rule_metadata.author: Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter (with combination of work from Kevin Breen)

rules.rule_text:
rule Xtreme
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter (with combination of work from Kevin Breen)"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2015-03-25"
		description = "Identify XtremeRat"

	strings:
		$s1 = "XTREME" wide
		$s2 = "XTREMEBINDER" wide
		$s3 = "DVCLAL" wide
		$s4 = "PACKAGEINFO" wide
		$s5 = "XTREMEUPDATE" wide
		$a1 = "XTREME" wide
		$a2 = "ServerStarted" wide
		$a3 = "XtremeKeylogger" wide
		$a4 = "x.html" wide
		$a5 = "Xtreme RAT" wide

	condition:
		all of ( $s* ) or all of ( $a* )
}
